title: Advanced Commands
body:
Adds more commands to Minecraft. Here are some of the awesome commands you can use:
/explode = Makes a creeper-sized explosion where you currently are.
/nuke = Makes a massive-sized hole where you are currently are.
/tsd = Sets the time to day.

Hint: Make your friend add it to the server or world because the commands don't require OP.
Also requires Maple API modrinth.com/mod/maple-api
